title: HER JOURNEY - 211info
text: ABUSE RECOVERY MINISTRY AND SERVICES HER JOURNEY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 15 week faith-based program that provides a safe and supportive environment for women seeking healing from current or past abusive or controlling relationships. Individuals can join at any time and continue as long as they find it helpful. Groups are held in multiple locations in person and virtually. Eligibility: Women age 14 and older who have experienced domestic abuse, including emotional, verbal, sexual, spiritual, financial, animal, property, and/or physical abuse Hours: Hours vary Email (503) 846-9284 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 846-9284 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for location information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian AREA SERVED: Nationwide SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Domestic Violence Support Groups * Women Other Services Offered At This Location: LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - MANKIND LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - VIRTUE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
